name: Gomez Bus Svc
service_types: charter/transportation (Spanish-language operator; school bus listing referenced)
recent_news: Website gomezbusline.com is a placeholder/under-construction (2026 check). Listed on Yelp/Nextdoor/Manta as a Houston bus service at 5454 Cherry Creek Dr / 7107 Fairway Dr.
fit_notes: Very small Houston operator (~33 employees, ~$1.9M revenue). Likely charter/Hispanic-market focused rather than a true K-12 contract operator; minimal web presence and unclear district contracts make it a low-priority tuck-in unless validated as HISD/charter-school subcontractor.

name: VIP School Bus
service_types: party bus / charter (marketed as 'school bus' branded party bus)
districts_or_customers: None identified; positioned as party/charter rentals (e.g., French Quarter trips)
recent_news: Yelp lists VIP School Bus at 11 W 23rd St, Kenner, LA as CLOSED. YouTube promo (2014) described it as a party bus operator, not a K-12 contractor.
fit_notes: NOT A FIT. Appears to be a defunct party-bus rental operation (yellow school-bus aesthetic) in Kenner, LA - not a school-district contractor. Yelp marks it closed. Exclude from target list.

name: Bus-Let Inc
principals: Unknown (CA C-Corp filed 1972, officers not surfaced)
service_types: per CA filings: 'sheeted printing and mailing' (not transportation)
recent_news: California Secretary of State records show Bus-Let, Inc. (entity #0657284) was SUSPENDED by FTB/SOS and DISSOLVED on January 25, 2018. Stated business activity was printing/mailing, not student transport.
website: abmail.com (per source list; not a transportation site)
fit_notes: NOT A FIT. Entity dissolved 2018; California SOS records indicate it was a printing/mailing C-Corp despite the 'Bus-Let' name. Misclassified in source data. Exclude.

name: H & M Bus Co
service_types: charter bus service (Local & Suburban Transit; charter except local)
districts_or_customers: DC/PG County metro area; specific district contracts not confirmed online
recent_news: BBB profile (A+ rating, not accredited) shows company active in Capitol Heights, MD since Feb 9, 2004 under Melvin A. Myles. Buzzfile/D&B list it as Bus Charter Service.
website: None confirmed (data file lists 'Reply.Com' - likely placeholder/no real website)
fit_notes: Very small operator (~3-4 employees per HQ data, $1.4M revenue) and primarily charter rather than confirmed school-district contractor; founder Myles likely near succession age (20+ years in business). Marginal tuck-in size but could be relevant in DC/PG County footprint if district contracts are confirmed.

name: Brown Bus Svc
principals: Dale Brown Jr. (Owner-Operator); Bob Brown (VP per source data)
service_types: school bus contractor (Cecil County Public Schools, including special-education routes)
districts_or_customers: Cecil County Public Schools (CCPS) - confirmed on official contractor roster
recent_news: Listed on CCPS 2024-25 bus contractor roster (Dale Brown Jr., 443-553-7836). Coverage in cecildaily/myeasternshoremd referenced a driver who later drove a Brown Bus Service school route.
fit_notes: Legitimate family-owned Cecil County, MD school-bus contractor on the CCPS contractor list with SPED route exposure - a real (if very small) Summit-style tuck-in candidate. Two-generation Brown family involvement (Dale Jr. + Bob Brown VP) suggests possible succession dynamics; worth a courtesy call given Maryland footprint fit.
